Author: sunpoet

QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355169/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
  
  PR:		ports/189512
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Time-Object/Makefile

Modified: head/devel/p5-Time-Object/Makefile
==============================================================================

+++ head/devel/p5-Time-Object/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:37:01 2014	(r355169)
@@ -8,8 +8,11 @@ CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A Perl OO interface to time and dates
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Perl OO interface to time and dates
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure
